CONTENT.Club career: Fatih made his professional debut for Beşiktaş in a 2–1 Turkish Cup win over Kayserispor on 14 December 2016. He made his Süper Lig debut with Beşiktaş in a 0–0 draw against Yeni Malatyaspor on 25 November 2017.
CONTENT.External links: Fatih Aksoy at SoccerwayFatih Aksoy at the Turkish Football FederationFatih Aksoy at www.mackolik.com (in Turkish)Fatih Aksoy – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.International career: Fatih is a youth international for Turkey, and represented them at the 2018 Toulon Tournament.

SUMMARY: Fatih Aksoy (born 6 November 1997) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Alanyaspor.
